bird.summary: The spot-backed puffbird (Nystalus maculatus) is a species of bird in the family Bucconidae, the puffbirds, nunlets, and nunbirds. It is fo…

relations.subject: Spot-backed puffbird
relations.evidence: It inhabits a variety of semi-open landscapes including the interior and edges of deciduous woodland, savanna, palm groves, shrub- and scrublands, and pastures
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
